name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-video-generate
description: MyndHyve ads.video.generate — generate ad creative videos via the host's ctx.callVideoGenerator (aiProviders.videoGeneration sub-capability from spec PR #53). Symmetric companion to ads-image-generate but adapted for video (single video per call, host hides async polling internally, typical 30-120s latency). Caller-supplied placementSpec.videoSpec replaces source's PlatformSpecRegistry lookup.
author: MyndHyve
